overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rainy night in a futuristic city. The vehicle travels along elevated highways past industrial complexes before exiting to a lower street lined with neon billboards and digital advertisements.

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stationary position and begins driving along elevated highway
black sedan appears on left side, traveling parallel in the same direction

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated highway in heavy rain, navigating through industrial area with moderate speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel on the left side before being passed

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial structure with illuminated windows and metal scaffolding
yellow and black striped safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated road
metal pedestrian or utility bridge spanning across the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway during a heavy rainstorm, passing industrial complexes with illuminated windows. Yellow and black safety barriers line both sides of the road as the vehicle accelerates and overtakes a black sedan on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with concrete retaining walls

events.description: vehicle slows down and begins turning right onto the exit ramp
leaving main highway and entering curved exit ramp with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: slowing down and navigating the right-hand exit ramp, leaving the main highway

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall marking the exit ramp boundary
curved asphalt ramp with double yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes the exit ramp, turning right and slowing down as it descends from the elevated highway. Concrete retaining walls replace the industrial buildings on the left while yellow barriers continue on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower urban street with digital billboards and underpass

events.description: entering lower urban street with large illuminated digital billboards
passing under concrete overpass with increased neon lighting from advertisements

agents.ego_description: driving through lower urban area with neon signage, passing under overpasses and alongside digital billboards

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
buildings with bright pink and blue neon signage and illuminated windows
elevated highway structure passing overhead creating sheltered underpass
red and white striped construction barriers lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a lower urban street dominated by massive digital billboards and neon signage. The vehicle passes under concrete overpasses, transitioning from the industrial highway to a more commercial area with bright artificial lighting and red-and-white construction barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a rainy industrial highway down into a neon-lit urban commercial district. It begins by accelerating along an elevated road amidst a heavy rainstorm, passing illuminated industrial complexes and overtaking a black sedan between yellow and black safety barriers. As the vehicle takes a right-hand exit ramp, the industrial buildings give way to concrete retaining walls while the speed decreases during the descent. The scene then shifts into a lower urban street, passing under concrete overpasses as the environment transforms from a gray industrial zone into a vibrant area dominated by massive digital billboards and neon signage. Finally, the camera glides past bright artificial lighting and red-and-white construction barriers, completing the move into the heart of the city.
